name: context-handoff
description: Automatically prepare near-full Codex thread handoffs and start fresh continuation sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Hand off near-full Codex threads to fresh sessions.
interface.longDescription: Context Handoff packages a skill and compact-time hooks that preserve work when a Codex thread approaches the context limit. It drafts a complete handoff and starts a fresh continuation thread when thread tools are available.
defaultPrompt: Use $context-handoff to move this near-full thread into a fresh session.
